Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Harmony]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Harmony is a Truegold at the peak of his stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Harmony breathes darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Harmony's soulspace contains a spark of soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Harmony was Mercy's fiancé.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Harmony has purple eyes and a black disc Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Harmony wears black-and-white sacred artist's robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Harmony is an Akura representative.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Harmony raised a dead sapphire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony has an Eye of the Deep and access to Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony is a member of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony shoved the Eye inside a cage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony possesses shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Harmony stands in front of a stone birdbath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Harmony wears armor of violet crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's spirit and body were exhausted from a fight with Harmony.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Harmony is a character mentioned by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Harmony was sent to Ghostwater by the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon wanted to tell her exactly what had happened to Harmony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Harmony killed Renfei with a single attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Harmony uses an axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Harmony is the grand-nephew of Akura Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Harmony was killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Harmony was an engagement partner of Akura Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Harmony was chosen by Charity to be the second on the primary team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Harmony's spirit is associated with a binding inside Lindon's axe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon is reluctant to give up Harmony's axe because of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Harmony was Charity's selection for her team.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Harmony favors the Shadow’s Edge technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Harmony is a character Lindon thought of but did not name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura clan took Lindon to task over Harmony.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Malice was treated similarly to Harmony.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
